{"version":3,"file":"tsrScript.js","sources":["../../../src/ssr/tsrScript.ts?script-string"],"sourcesContent":["self.$_TSR = {\n h() {\n this.hydrated = true\n this.c()\n },\n e() {\n this.streamEnded = true\n this.c()\n },\n c() {\n if (this.hydrated && this.streamEnded) {\n delete self.$_TSR\n delete self.$R['tsr']\n }\n },\n p(script) {\n !this.initialized ? this.buffer.push(script) : script()\n },\n buffer: [],\n}\n"],"names":[],"mappings":"AAAA,MAAA,6BAAe;"}
